block.createcompletelycreate.block_expel: Uses _rotational force_ to conjure blocks from two ingredients.
Place _block ingredients_ on the _side_ and _below_ the heaver, and a _catalyst_ on _top_. Outputs can be plundered from _below_ via a _chute_ or collected via _right-click_.
block.createcompletelycreate.brass_block: A grander heaver that produces _more booty_ per cycle and accepts _advanced heaving_.
Place _block ingredients_ on the _side_ and _below_ the heaver, and a _catalyst_ on _top_. Outputs can be plundered from _below_ via a _chute_ or collected via _right-click_.
Can process recipes that require _advanced heaving_, such as _obsidian_ and _snow_.
